title: Files
name: File name
dragAndDrop: Drag and drop files here or click to select files
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
sendDocumentsHelpAdd: Add emails from the available list or by typing a new one.
sendDocumentsHelpRemove: You can remove a recipient from the selected list.
sendDocumentsHelpRestricted: If an email appears in red, it does not have permission for this document type.
sendDocumentsHelpCco: CCO emails are always shown in CCO emails; you can include them as recipients.
uploadHelpStep1: You can upload documents manually with the Upload document button.
uploadHelpStep2: Before uploading, choose the document name and its visibility for the customer.
uploadHelpStep3: Drag the file or click to select it (PDF only).
uploadHelpStep4: You can also create the default documents with the Create default files button.
create_default_files_message: If the order has an invoice, it will create: Shipment Notice, Order Delivery Notice, and Availability Notice. If there is no invoice, it will create only the Order Receipt Notice.
uploadHelpStep5: If there is no invoice, only Order Receipt Notice is created. If there is an invoice, Shipment Notice, Order Delivery Notice, and Availability Notice are created.
messageTooltip: Message that will be printed on the sent document as additional information
noRecipientsSelected: Please select at least one recipient
noEmailRecipients: No recipients configured for this customer
chooseOrderDescription: Choose an order to view its documents
sharedDocumentsDescription: View, download, and manage all documents shared with you by the company
